case_title: BRENDA CARLINA TRISTAN RAMIREZ VS. HIHOAN TRUONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TRISTAN RAMIREZ, BRENDA CARLINA AS TO DEFENDANT TRUONG, HIHOAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED AUG-24-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRUONG, HIHOAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF BRENDA CARLINA TRISTAN RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HIHOAN TRUONG IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRISTAN RAMIREZ, BRENDA CARLINA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRISTAN RAMIREZ, BRENDA CARLINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUONG, HIHOAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, DEFENDANT SHALL ALSO PAY $75.00 FOR COURT COSTS AS PLAINTIFF'S FEES WERE WAIVED DIRECTLY TO THE COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
